Footer.summary: Tretrip is a bilingual football news and competition platform built for editorial publishing, internal activations, and public campaigns.

Home.title: A scalable football desk for news, competitions, and community engagement.
Home.subtitle: Tretrip starts with sports and internal competition workflows, with a modular foundation ready for broader editorial categories later.
Home.emptyCompetitions: No competitions are active right now.

News.title: Tretrip Newsroom
News.subtitle: Published football stories, editorial updates, and campaign coverage.
News.commentPlaceholder: Share your perspective on this story
News.loginToComment: Log in to comment and like content.
News.notFound: This article could not be found.

Competitions.title: Tretrip Competitions
Competitions.subtitle: Internal and public football competitions built for engagement and repeat participation.
Competitions.registrationClosed: Registration has closed for this competition.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your profile, join competitions, and engage with the newsroom.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Register to comment, like articles, and join football competitions.

Profile.title: Your profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your account details and review your activity across Tretrip.
Profile.emptyCompetitions: You have not joined any competitions yet.

Dashboard.title: Editorial dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Manage users, categories, articles, competitions, and comment moderation.
